title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 23
summary: Oil gained after Iran-backed Houthi militants said they targeted two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea, escalating the Middle East conflict and threatening deeper supply disruptions.

title: Brent Crude Spikes in Late Trading After Red Sea Tanker Attack
summary: Oil prices rose sharply in post-settlement trading Wednesday, with Brent crude oil rising near $95 a barrel after Yemen’s Iran-backed Houthi rebels said they struck two Saudi tankers.

title: Mexico City Pozole Chain Casa de Tono Explores Sale on Expansion Pitch
summary: Mexican family-owned restaurant chain La Casa de Toño is seeking a sale in a deal that could top $400 million and set the business up for expansion, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Southwest Hedges Full-Year Guidance as Fuel Expenses Tick Up
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. broadened its guidance for full-year 2026 to account for uncertainty resulting from the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran, which sent fuel expenses higher in the second quarter.
